message.content: The character's neural implants hummed to life unbidden, flooding their cortex with a stranger's raw sensory cascade. Heat bloomed first—a deep, insistent warmth radiating from the core, like molten circuits overheating in their veins, spreading outward in pulsing waves that made their skin prickle and flush. Touches ghosted across their own body in phantom echoes: silken friction gliding over curves and hollows, firm pressures that gripped and yielded, each one amplified into electric shudders rippling through muscle and nerve. Arousal hit like a system surge, vertiginous and all-consuming—heart-rate spiking, breath ragged, a tidal rush of endorphins drowning rational thought in a haze of urgent, animal need. Overload crashed in: synapses firing wildly, vision blurring with static sparks, the boundary between self and other dissolving into a chaotic storm of bliss and disorientation. They gasped, yanking the implant feed offline just as the peak threatened to fry their neural pathways entirely.
